name: Abdullah Al Barri Wa Abdullah Al Bahri
overview: A series that revolves around Abdullah, who works as a hunter, and depends on his family after the death of his father, and during his hunting one day, a person named Abdullah, who lives in the depths of the sea, and the material condition of Abdullah Al-Bari changes after he obtained pearls from the sea in exchange for giving him fruits to the inhabitants of the sea, and opens the greeds of some villains in the village.

trailers.title: مسلسل : عبدالله البري و عبدالله البحري - الحلقة ١-٥
